form.backersStakeHint: Your profit if the lay wins
form.freeBetNote: Promotion stake only — winnings are recorded without returning the stake. A loss records zero P/L because you did not risk your own money.
form.cashOutExceedsMax: Cash-out exceeds the maximum return (stake × odds). The amount will still be saved.
form.kellyNoEdge: No edge — Kelly suggests no bet
form.legsHint: Each selection must win for the multiple to win. Odds use the format chosen below.
form.maxLegs: A multiple can have at most {{max}} selections.
form.needTwoLegs: A multiple needs at least 2 selections.
form.legMissingFields: Each selection needs an event and a selection.
form.legBadOdds: Each selection needs valid odds greater than 1.

meta.title: mybetrecord — Sports Betting Tracker, ROI & Kelly Stake Ledger

home.heroTitle: Sports betting tracker for people who bet to a number
home.heroLead: Stop juggling spreadsheets. Log every wager, track ROI and yield, size stakes with Kelly, and see where your edge really lives.
home.section1Title: From spreadsheet chaos to a disciplined ledger
home.section1Sub: Most bettors outgrow notes apps and Excel tabs. mybetrecord gives you one place to record bets, settle outcomes, and read honest performance numbers.
home.featureOddsDesc: Decimal, American, fractional, and Asian formats — normalised automatically so reports stay consistent.
home.featureKellyDesc: Set bankroll and edge inputs; get recommended stake sizes based on the Kelly criterion.
home.featureRoiDesc: Strike rate, turnover, profit by month, and a cumulative equity curve for settled bets.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Slice performance by sport, bet type, tipster, or bookmaker to find where you win and leak.
home.featureClvDesc: Record closing odds and measure CLV — a sharper signal than short-term results alone.
home.featureExportDesc: Download CSV, Excel, or JSON. Generate API keys for scripts and automation.
home.pricingSub: Every feature below is included on both plans. Pro removes the daily logging cap — about $5 USD per month in your local currency.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Up to 5 bets and 5 multis per day
home.pricingProLimit: Unlimited bets and multis every day
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Full bet ledger — events, selections, stakes, outcomes & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: All odds formats — decimal, American, fractional & Asian
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Every bet type — win, each-way, over-under, multis & handicap
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Kelly stake sizing from your bankroll & stated edge
home.pricingFeatureReports: ROI, yield, strike rate & cumulative equity curve
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Breakdowns by sport, bet type, tipster & bookmaker
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Model & personal implied odds with per-unit edge
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Cash-out amounts & winnings deductions on winners
home.pricingNote: Pro is roughly $5 USD per month, shown in your local currency. Cancel anytime from Settings.
home.section2Sub: Learn the maths behind the metrics — then track them in your ledger.
home.blogRoiDesc: Two headline numbers, often confused. Know which one answers which question.
home.blogKellyDesc: How optimal stake sizing works — and why most bettors use a fraction of full Kelly.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: When Excel is enough — and when a dedicated ledger saves hours and errors.
home.faqTrackerQ: What is a sports betting tracker?
home.faqTrackerA: A structured ledger for every wager — stakes, odds, outcomes, and profit — with automatic ROI, yield, and breakdowns instead of manual spreadsheet formulas.
home.faqOddsA: Decimal, American, fractional, Hong Kong, Malaysian, and Indonesian. All bets are stored with canonical decimal odds for reporting.
home.faqKellyQ: How does Kelly stake work here?
home.faqKellyA: Enter personal implied odds on a bet. With bankroll and Kelly multiplier set in settings, the app recommends a stake based on your stated edge.
home.faqExportQ: Can I export or use an API?
home.faqExportA: Yes — CSV, Excel, and JSON exports plus API keys for programmatic access to your record.
home.faqTipsterA: No. mybetrecord is record-keeping and analytics only. We do not sell picks or promise profits.
home.rg: Responsible gambling. Betting should be entertainment, not income. Never stake more than you can afford to lose. If gambling is affecting your life, seek help from organisations such as BeGambleAware or Gambling Therapy. mybetrecord does not facilitate placing bets — it helps you understand your own history.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to bet to a number?
home.ctaLead: Create a free account and log your first bet in under a minute.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Analytics and record-keeping — not gambling advice.
